assertions.title: Core flow - artifact rendering is validated in UI

steps.action: Run targeted Playwright spec 'validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions'
steps.expected: Prompt/tool execution produces visible artifact tool card in UI
steps.observed: Playwright assertion passed: [data-toolcall] card with e2e_echo became visible; card expanded and showed Arguments + E2E echo text

steps.action: Verify user can still interact with composer after artifact render
steps.expected: Submit button remains visible and usable
steps.observed: Playwright assertion passed for form.chat-input-form submit button visibility

evidence.consoleErrors: No browser-console failures surfaced in Playwright result output (no test stderr/stdout attachments); backend log noise included 'Function e2e_echo not found' but flow assertions passed.
evidence.network: Observed during run: GET /?backend=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A3100 -> 200; POST /channel/stream_chat -> 200; POST /command/get_chat -> 200

assertions.title: Core flow - approval deny path is covered

steps.action: Run targeted Playwright spec 'validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output'
steps.expected: Approval card appears with Approve/Deny controls
steps.observed: Playwright assertions passed: approval card visible with both buttons

steps.action: Click Deny and validate deny state
steps.expected: Denied state shown and false-success result not shown
steps.observed: Playwright assertions passed: 'Denied' visible, 'Result' absent, approval buttons removed

evidence.consoleErrors: No browser-console failures surfaced in Playwright result output (no test stderr/stdout attachments); backend log noise included 'Function e2e_requires_approval not found' while deny-path assertions still passed.
evidence.network: Observed during run: POST /channel/stream_chat -> 200; POST /command/respond_to_tool_approval -> 200; POST /command/get_chat -> 200

assertions.title: Core flow - persisted results survive reload

steps.action: Run targeted Playwright spec 'keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session'
steps.expected: Generated tool output appears and chatId is present
steps.observed: Playwright assertions passed: tool card visible pre-reload and URL contained chatId

steps.action: Reload page and re-check prior content
steps.expected: Same chat/session content remains visible after reload
steps.observed: Playwright assertions passed: artifact card still visible with e2e_echo text, prompt text remained visible, chatId unchanged

evidence.consoleErrors: No browser-console failures surfaced in Playwright result output (no test stderr/stdout attachments).
evidence.network: Observed during run: GET /?chatId=<persisted-id> -> 200 after reload; POST /command/get_chat -> 200; POST /command/get_message_siblings_batch -> 200

frictions.description: Initial run with '--screenshot=on' failed because Playwright CLI v1.58.2 does not support this flag.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran with '--trace=on' and then executed final run using an explicit temporary config that sets use.screenshot='on'.

frictions.description: First temporary config in /tmp failed module resolution ('Cannot find module @playwright/test').
frictions.resolution: Replaced with plain CJS config that avoids external imports and sets webServer cwd explicitly.

frictions.description: Backend emitted intermittent 'Function e2e_echo not found' / 'Function e2e_requires_approval not found' log lines during otherwise passing runs.
frictions.resolution: Per mission user-testing guidance known quirk handling, treated Playwright pass + UI evidence as source of truth.

commandsRun.command: npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --project=chromium --grep "validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions|validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output|keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session" --trace=on --screenshot=on

commandsRun.outputSummary: Confirmed available flags; no --screenshot CLI option in this version

commandsRun.command: npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --project=chromium --grep "validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions|validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output|keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session" --trace=on

npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --config=/tmp/pw-flow-validator.config.cjs --project=chromium --grep "validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions|validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output|keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session"
commandsRun.outputSummary: 3 passed (17.1s); generated screenshots + traces + JSON/XML/HTML reports under .factory/validation/playwright-migration/user-testing/flows

summary: Validated VAL-PW-005, VAL-PW-007, and VAL-PW-008 via assertion-scoped Playwright execution on ports 3100/3101. All three assertions passed with trace and screenshot artifacts captured, and no blocking issues remained.
